title: Prosthechea inversa
taxonomy: Prosthechea inversa is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subtribe Cymbidiinae and is further classified under the genus Prosthechea. Prosthechea inversa is native to Central and South America, specifically in countries such as Mexico and Costa Rica. This orchid species is often found in tropical and subtropical regions. Its classification within the orchid family is further specified as Cymbidieae tribe.

intro: Prosthechea inversa, also known as the Inverted Lip Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include the ability to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
